narrative:
Jefferson Twp township has 661 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a clear Republican lean of 9.5 percentage points.
